description_long: This kiosk features a sleek, modern design with a tall, narrow pedestal base supporting a large, horizontally oriented touchscreen display. The display surface is bordered by a thin, black frame and showcases a digital interface with blue and white graphical elements, suggesting interactive functionality. The pedestal is primarily gray with black accents, and its structure tapers slightly as it rises, giving the kiosk a stable yet elegant appearance. The front of the pedestal is flat and smooth, while the sides reveal a subtle angular profile. The kiosk appears to be constructed from metal and glass or acrylic, with a solid, robust build suitable for public urban environments. There are no visible doors or windows, and the only signage is the digital content displayed on the screen.
description: A modern, pedestal-style kiosk with a large interactive touchscreen display and a sleek, angular base in gray and black tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full touchscreen display and the flat, smooth face of the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled profile of the pedestal and the thinness of the display.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back panel of the pedestal and the depth of the kiosk's structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the pedestal's angular design.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the top surface, showing graphical interface and text
attribute_roof_design: flat, rectangular display surface with a thin black frame and no overhangs
